projects.title: Computational Design & Coding
projects.description: Exploration of computational design principles and coding logic. This work relates to my role as a Teaching Assistant for Computational Design III & IV and Digital Design 1 at ETH Zürich.

projects.title: Structural Systems (Tragwerk)
projects.description: A deep dive into structural systems, concept development, and process documentation. Includes posters, concept sketches, and detailed structural plans completed during my fourth semester at ETH Zürich.

projects.title: Urban Housing & Density
projects.description: Architectural exploration of urban density, featuring site plans (situationsplan), floor plans (grundriss), and sections (schnitt) alongside atmospheric collages and physical model renders.

projects.title: Professional Practice
projects.description: Selection of professional work and documentation produced during my year-long internship at Clou Architekten in Zürich.

projects.title: Climate & Environment
projects.description: Research-based project focusing on environmental factors, sustainability, and climate-responsive design strategies.

projects.title: Foundations of Design
projects.description: Early studio work including axonometric drawings, hand sketches (skizzen), and initial architectural renders following my move from Guatemala to Switzerland.

projects.title: Materiality & Model Making
projects.description: Exploration of physical materiality and actor-network theory through model making and technical layout design.

projects.title: Artistic Exploration (Kunst)
projects.description: A collection of artistic works (Kunst) and model explorations produced alongside architectural curriculum requirements.
